name: airflow
description: Apache Airflow REST API integration for DuckPipe

tools.name: airflow_list_dags
tools.description: List all DAGs and their current state

tools.name: airflow_get_dag_runs
tools.description: Get recent runs for a specific DAG with status

tools.name: airflow_get_task_instances
tools.description: List task instances for a run with their state

tools.name: airflow_get_task_logs
tools.description: Fetch logs for a specific task instance

tools.name: airflow_clear_task
tools.description: Clear a failed task for retry
